documents.terms_and_conditions:
UCC Supermarket - Full Terms & Conditions
UCC Supermarket, located at 17 Worthington Avenue, Kingston 5, Jamaica, W.I., provides grocery
retail services through in-store and digital platforms. By accessing or using our services, you agree
to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
Customers must ensure that all information provided during checkout is accurate and complete.
Orders placed through the platform are subject to acceptance and availability.
All prices are listed in Jamaican Dollars (JMD) and may change without prior notice. We reserve the
right to cancel or refuse any order due to pricing errors or stock limitations.
Orders may be collected in-store during designated business hours. Customers are required to
present confirmation upon pickup. Orders not collected within the specified timeframe may be
canceled without notice.
Delivery services are available within Kingston and surrounding areas. Delivery times are estimates
only and may be impacted by traffic, weather conditions, or operational delays.
Customers are responsible for providing accurate delivery details. UCC Supermarket shall not be
liable for failed deliveries due to incorrect information provided by the customer.
Non-perishable items may be returned within three (3) days of purchase with a valid receipt.
Perishable goods are non-returnable unless defective or unfit for consumption at the time of
delivery.
Refunds will be processed within five (5) to ten (10) business days using the original payment
method where applicable.
UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising
from the use of our services.
Users agree to indemnify and hold harmless UCC Supermarket against any claims, damages, or
expenses arising from misuse of the platform.
In the event of circumstances beyond our control, including natural disasters, system failures, or
supply disruptions, UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for failure to fulfill obligations.
These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by the laws of Jamaica, and any disputes shall be
resolved under Jamaican jurisdiction.
documents.privacy_policy:
UCC Supermarket - Privacy Policy
UCC Supermarket is committed to safeguarding the privacy of its customers and ensuring that
personal data is handled responsibly.
We collect personal information such as names, contact details, and delivery addresses solely for
the purpose of processing orders and providing services.
Payment information is handled securely through trusted third-party providers and is not stored
directly by UCC Supermarket.
Personal data may be shared with delivery personnel and payment processors strictly for
operational purposes.
We do not sell, rent, or trade personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
Appropriate technical and organizational measures are implemented to protect personal data
against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
While we strive to protect your information, no method of transmission over the internet is
completely secure.
Customers have the right to request access to their personal data, request corrections, or request
deletion where applicable.
Data is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill business and legal obligations.
In the event of a data breach, UCC Supermarket will take appropriate steps to notify affected users
in accordance with applicable laws.
This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of Jamaica.
documents.llm_guidelines:
UCC Supermarket - AI (LLM) Usage Policy
UCC Supermarket provides an AI-powered assistant to enhance the shopping experience by
helping users browse products and generate shopping lists.
The AI assistant does not process, store, or retain personal information including but not limited to
names, addresses, or payment details.
Users are strictly advised not to input sensitive personal information when interacting with the AI
system.
All purchases must be completed independently by the user through the official checkout system.
The AI assistant does not process transactions or confirm orders.
The AI may provide recommendations based on general product data; however, UCC Supermarket
does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of such recommendations.
Users acknowledge that reliance on AI-generated suggestions is at their own risk.
UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for any decisions made based on AI-generated content.
The AI system is continuously monitored to prevent unauthorized data access or leakage.
Any misuse of the AI system, including attempts to input malicious or sensitive data, may result in
restricted access.
By using the AI assistant, users agree to these terms and acknowledge its limitations.
